## Summary

Describe the change in a few bullets.

## Why

Explain the problem this PR solves.

## Scope

- [ ] Code
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Tests
- [ ] Config or scripts
- [ ] UI

## Validation

List what you ran locally, for example:

- `make preflight`
- `make smoke`
- targeted unit tests
- targeted e2e tests

## Risks

Call out any migration, compatibility, or regression risks.

## Checklist

- [ ] No secrets, models, logs, or generated runtime data added to Git
- [ ] Docs updated if user-visible behavior changed
- [ ] Tests added or updated where the change materially affects behavior
- [ ] Public-facing wording stays consistent with current UI/API terms
